title: Code is cheap now, still some people are delivering bad
previewHtml: I'm still coming around bad software, and I think there's no excuses. Honestely, I think on Vero we have an incredible good flow with AI right now, and you can ask anyone, we been moving fast, but we have been intentionally critics.

title: Chess game api
previewHtml: Chess API built on an append-only event ledger. Game state is never stored directly — it's derived on every read by replaying events from the beginning. XState drives lifecycle transitions, chess.js enforces board rules. The design is just the event stream.

title: How SPA routers work
previewHtml:
The browser was built for documents. When you click a link, it fetches a new page. Modern SPAs work around, the piece of code responsible for that is the router.

I built a small one from scratch to understand what Next.js, TanStack Router, and React Router are actually doing underneath.

title: Reminder to self: write the test first, even when you're sure
previewHtml: Especially when you're sure. The bugs I'm proudest of catching all started with the sentence "I don't need a test for this."
